30089.descEn: When bond gauge is full: Mood Effect +60%

30090.descEn: Initial Wit +10 per support card in your deck (Friend/Group cards give +2 to all stats instead)

30092.descEn: When bond gauge is 80 or higher: Speed Bonus +2

30093.descEn: When bond gauge is 80 or higher: Power Bonus +2

30094.descEn: The lower your energy, the greater the Friendship Bonus (up to +15%)
